meta.title: Ukraine receives new western fighter jets: The Mirage 2000
meta.description:
The Mirage 2000 is a capable 4th generation (non-stealth) fighter originally designed as an air-to-air interceptor for France, but will soon be flying strike missions for Ukraine. 

Follow Sandboxx to stay on top of the latest in Defense news!
